originalTitle: Partner of US influencer who died in Zanzibar speaking to police as witness
title: Partner of US influencer who died in Zanzibar speaking to police as witness
content: The police said Ashly Robinson, known online as Ashlee Jenae, had died after attempting to take her own life.

originalTitle: Cameroon separatists to pause fighting ahead of Pope visit
title: Cameroon separatists to pause fighting ahead of Pope visit
content: The separatists say their decison reflects responsibility, restraint and respect for human dignity.

originalTitle: Can this man broaden the appeal of a South African party seen by some as 'too white'?
title: Can this man broaden the appeal of a South African party seen by some as 'too white'?
content: The Democratic Alliance's new leader, Geordin Hill-Lewis, admits the party's support is too narrow.

originalTitle: Fifth woman accuses former US lawmaker Eric Swalwell of sexual misconduct
title: Fifth woman accuses former US lawmaker Eric Swalwell of sexual misconduct
content: The Democratic representative has resigned his seat in Congress over multiple sexual misconduct allegations.

originalTitle: Atletico edge Barcelona on aggregate to reach Champions League semifinal
title: Atletico edge Barcelona on aggregate to reach Champions League semifinal
content: Atletico Madrid advance 3-2 on aggregate, despite a 2-1 home defeat by Barcelona, in a thrilling encounter.

originalTitle: Canada faces calls to rescind planned cuts to refugee healthcare scheme
title: Canada faces calls to rescind planned cuts to refugee healthcare scheme
content: Health workers and rights advocates say co-payments, set to take effect on May 1, amount to 'de facto denial of care'.

originalTitle: Hamas rejects Gaza disarmament plan, Palestinian official says
title: Hamas rejects Gaza disarmament plan, Palestinian official says
content: The official tells the BBC that the armed group will not move forward with talks until Israel fully complies with its commitments.

originalTitle: JD Vance defends backing 'great guy' Orbán's campaign after landslide defeat
title: JD Vance defends backing 'great guy' Orbán's campaign after landslide defeat
content: Hungary's leader was a "great guy" who did a "very good job", the US vice-president said, but he was sure he could work with Péter Magyar.

originalTitle: Another woman accuses Swalwell of rape, saying he drugged her in 2018
title: Another woman accuses Swalwell of rape, saying he drugged her in 2018
content: Lonna Drewes accused Swalwell of drugging her drink before assaulting her in a hotel room.

originalTitle: Success over Spain - but how can England get best out of classy James?
title: Success over Spain - but how can England get best out of classy James?
content: How can Sarina Wiegman get the best from one of England's most talented footballers, Lauren James?

originalTitle: Slot fears Ekitike injury is 'really bad'
title: Slot fears Ekitike injury is 'really bad'
content: Liverpool boss Arne Slot says Hugo Ekitike's injury 'looks really bad' after the France striker was taken off on a stretcher during Tuesday's Champions League loss to Paris St-Germain.

originalTitle: McArdle praises NI's 'intent' in big win over Malta
title: McArdle praises NI's 'intent' in big win over Malta
content: Northern Ireland boss Michael McArdle praises the "intent" his side showed in his first game in charge as they eased to a 4-0 win over Malta in World Cup qualifying.
